title: [YTP] What is HazinizaH?
description: [10/31/15] - Upon completing Greer Lol, I stumbled upon this sus, and had to edit it. Unfortunately, I could not procure a SUS mechanism. This was 始める'd in late 2014, along with the Star Fox poop and was just a little meager edit. Hope you enjoy, joyoj, joj.
